description: Free destressing and decorating event - supplies, snacks, fun vibe provided! Open to all students! On the Rutgers-NB College Ave Extended Campus, EE Campus Bus to SoCam, walk one block! Buzz the door to the building or knock hard! The room is located on the 1st floor after you enter.
location: Civic Square Building (College Ave Campus - EE bus - SoCam Apts stop)

description: Headline: THE FINAL SIZZLE: GSA EOY BBQ PARTY! 🍔☀️ The semester is winding down, and it’s time to trade the textbooks for tongs! Join the GSA for our massive End of Year Barbeque—the ultimate celebration before finals season officially kicks in. We’re firing up the grills for an afternoon of great food, chilled drinks, and the best community vibes on campus. Whether you're a carnivore or a veggie-lover, we’ve got something delicious waiting for you!   📅 Date: Friday, May 8th   ⏰ Time: 5:00 PM – 8:00 PM   📍 Location: Buell Apartments Lawn, Busch Campus, 55 Bevier Rd, Piscataway, NJ   🥗 Menu: Freshly grilled favorites (Vegetarian and Halaal options included!)   ⚠️ RSVP IS MANDATORY: We need an accurate headcount to make sure the grill never goes cold.
name: GSA EOY Barbeque Party

description: Come celebrate the joy of singing with this day-long event of reconnecting with old friends and meeting new friends! If you have ever sung in a Rutgers choir at any point in your journey at Rutgers, join us on this day of singing. There will be light refreshments in the morning, and then lunch is on your own. We end the day with a relaxed performance of the pieces we have worked on throughout the day.
name: ACDA Choral Alumni Festival

description: Join us for a free student dinner in the Catholic Center right after the 6 pm student mass!

description: Geology and MSE research overlap more than you'd think! Come to the research mixer to present your research, explore collaborations, and share ideas in a casual setting!
name: EPS/MSE Research Mixer
organizationName: Materials Science and Engineering Graduate Student Association (Graduate Organization)

description: Join CBG and Friends for our End of Year Celebration on Thursday, May 14, 2026, from 6:00 PM to 9:00 PM as we come together to celebrate the accomplishments, memories, and community built throughout the year. Enjoy an evening filled with relaxation, creativity, and fun, including massages, henna, a paint and sip experience, delicious food, and more. This special night is an opportunity to unwind, connect with others, and close out the year with good energy and celebration. We look forward to celebrating with you and our collaborators SACNAS, MBGSO, GSA, and Scarlet Arts Rx!
name: End of year Celebration
organizationName: Council of Black Graduates (Graduate Student Organization)

Scarlet Arts Rx (Affiliated with a Mason Gross School of the Arts Department)

description: Join us for a hands-on outdoor experience at Rutgers Gardens designed for student parents/guardians and their children. This family-friendly session invites children to explore nature through observation and sketching the world around them. Guided by a trained facilitator and led by a Scarlet Arts Rx camp counselor, children will participate in nature-based art journaling activities that encourages curiosity and creativity. They will discover plants and insects while engaging in play and learning within an open, natural environment. This is a wonderful opportunity to spend quality time outdoors and connect with other Rutgers families. What to expect:  Guided nature exploration and journaling activities Art supplies provided Open, child-led creativity Food & Snacks available  Important: This is not a drop-off event. Parents/guardians must remain present. Come explore and connect!
name: Nature Explorers: Outdoor Nature Art Journaling for Children - FREE Event at Rutgers Gardens
